display.purpose: Error numerals and the largest ceremonial moments only.

headline.purpose: Page titles (h2). The primary screen heading.

title.purpose: Section headings, stat-card values, navbar brand, standalone hero numbers.

body.purpose: All running text, table cells, form labels. Cap at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase table headers and stat-card captions. The only tracked type.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default for cards and stat cards. A whisper of separation from the cream ground.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Card hover, dropdown menus, Tom Select dropdowns. The interactive response.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Deepest step, for prominent lifted surfaces.

shadows.name: button-glow
shadows.purpose: Soft green glow under a primary button on hover.

motion.name: ease-quick
motion.purpose: Color and shadow transitions on buttons, links, nav.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default commit action: submit a pick, save.
components.css: .ds-btn-greenside { background: #006747; color: #f7f8f9; border: none; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 6px; transition: background 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-greenside:hover { background: #007a54; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 103, 71, 0.25); } .ds-btn-greenside:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(0, 103, 71, 0.25); }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Reserved for special or celebratory actions, never a routine default.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { background: #b8993e; color: #00432e; border: none; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 6px; transition: background 0.15s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { background: #c4a747; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: The secondary action; fills solid green on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #006747; border: 1.5px solid #006747; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 6px; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #006747; color: #f7f8f9; }

components.name: Earnings Badges
components.description: Final earnings ride green; projected (live, not settled) earnings ride gold.
components.css: .ds-badge-earnings, .ds-badge-projected { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 0.35em 0.7em; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-badge-earnings { background: #006747; color: #f7f8f9; } .ds-badge-projected { background: #c4a747; color: #00432e; }

components.name: Major Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-major { display: inline-block; background: #faf3e0; color: #92722a; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.03em; padding: 0.3em 0.6em; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgba(184, 153, 62, 0.3); }

components.name: Card with Green Header
components.description: Primary content card on the cream ground; flat at rest, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 67, 46, 0.08); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 67, 46, 0.08); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease; max-width: 360px; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 67, 46, 0.10); } .ds-card-header { background: #006747; color: #f7f8f9; font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.2rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.25rem; color: #1a1f25; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Leaderboard Table Header
components.description: The signature surface: dark-green header with uppercase label type over a striped body.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; background: #ffffff; } .ds-table thead th { background: #005c3f; color: #f7f8f9; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 0.7rem 0.75rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid #00432e; } .ds-table tbody td { padding: 0.6rem 0.75rem; color: #1a1f25; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 67, 46, 0.06); } .ds-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) td { background: #faf8f4; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover td { background: #f0faf5; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact single-number display with ledger gravity: uppercase label over a serif value.
components.css: .ds-stat { text-align: center; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 67, 46, 0.08); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 67, 46, 0.08); padding: 1.25rem 1rem; max-width: 220px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #8b95a2; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.75rem; color: #006747; line-height: 1.1; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard field with a faint green stroke and a soft green focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #1a1f25; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 67, 46, 0.15); border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; min-width: 240px; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8b95a2; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #4da88a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.2rem rgba(0, 103, 71, 0.15); }

components.name: Status Pills
components.description: Tournament state vocabulary; blue/gray are role-locked to status.
components.html: Live Complete Open
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.3em 0.65em; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-pill-active { background: #2563eb; color: #fff; } .ds-pill-complete { background: #6b7280; color: #fff; } .ds-pill-open { background: #e8f5ef; color: #006747; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 103, 71, 0.2); }

narrative.overview: A heritage-golf clubhouse rendered as software. Deep Augusta-adjacent greens carry the structure, warm gold marks the things worth celebrating, and everything sits on a soft cream paper. The serif display face gives section headings the weight of a printed scorecard, while a humanist sans keeps dense earnings data legible at a glance on a phone. This is a money game, and the numbers are real dollars, so the system treats every earnings figure with the gravity of a financial ledger rather than the flash of a betting slate. The mood is confident and a little ceremonial, never loud. Surfaces rest nearly flat, lifting only in response to a hover or state change. Color is deployed by role, not for decoration: green is the institution, gold is the reward, and blues and grays are reserved strictly for live and completed status.
keyCharacteristics: Augusta-inspired green structure, warm gold reward accents, cream paper ground
Serif display headings (DM Serif Display) over humanist sans body (Plus Jakarta Sans)
Flat at rest, soft green-tinted lift on hover
Money and majors always read in the gold register; status reads in blue/gray
Glanceable on a phone, in sunlight, mid-banter

rules.name: The Money-Is-Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold is reserved for value: the leader, majors, the user's points total, projected and final earnings. It never appears as generic decoration. When you see gold, money or rank is involved.

rules.name: The Status-Is-Cool Rule
rules.body: Blue and gray exist only to signal tournament state (live, complete). They are forbidden as accent or decoration. The warm green/gold palette owns everything else.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black, No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Text is Ink (#1a1f25), grounds are Cream (#faf8f4) and White (#ffffff). Pure #000 and #fff are prohibited.

rules.name: The Serif-For-Gravity Rule
rules.body: Headings, the brand, and standalone hero numbers use DM Serif Display. Body and data tables stay in Plus Jakarta Sans for legibility. Never set a long table in the serif.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Label Rule
rules.body: Small uppercase labels (0.8rem, 0.05em tracking, weight 600) are the only place letter-spacing opens up. Body text never gets tracked.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Response Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat at rest and rise to Lifted only on hover. Elevation is feedback, not decoration. A card that floats before you touch it is wrong.

rules.name: The Green-Tint Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is tinted with the brand green (rgba(0, 67, 46, ...)). Neutral gray drop shadows are prohibited; they read as generic SaaS chrome.

dos: Do ground every screen on Cream (#faf8f4); lift cards and tables to White (#ffffff).
Do reserve gold for value: the leader, majors, the user's points, and earnings (projected gold, final green).
Do set headings and standalone hero numbers in DM Serif Display; keep tables and body in Plus Jakarta Sans.
Do tint every shadow with brand green (rgba(0, 67, 46, ...)) and keep surfaces flat until hover.
Do reserve status colors (Live Blue #2563eb, Complete Gray #6b7280) strictly for tournament state.
Do make the one number that matters (rank, active pick, deadline) readable at a glance on a phone in sunlight; hold AA contrast and large tap targets.
Do make pick state unambiguous: backup activation, withdrawals, major 1.5x, and missed-cut penalties must each be plainly legible.
donts: Don't drift into a generic SaaS dashboard: no cream-and-blue startup template, no hero-metric tiles, no identical icon-and-heading card grids, nothing that reads as 'an AI made this.'
Don't drift into a corporate enterprise tool: no cold, dense, gray admin-panel feel. Admin surfaces keep the clubhouse warmth.
Don't introduce sportsbook loudness: no neon, no flashing promos, no gamble-y urgency.
Don't use neutral gray drop shadows; they read as generic chrome. Green-tinted only.
Don't use pure #000 or pure #fff anywhere. Ink and Cream/White instead.
Don't use a colored side-stripe (border-left greater than 1px) as a decorative accent; use a full hairline border or a background tint.
Don't apply gold as a generic accent or blue/gray as decoration; both are role-locked.
Don't set long data tables in the serif display face; legibility wins.
Don't float cards before interaction; elevation is a response, not a resting state.
